{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'shelters': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Happy Paws Shelter', 'location': 'Islamabad, Pakistan', 'phone_number': '051-1234567', 'website': 'happypaws.pk', 'pets_count': 12, 'distance_km': 2.4}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Safe Haven Rescue', 'location': 'Lahore, Pakistan', 'phone_number': '042-7654321', 'website': 'safehaven.pk', 'pets_count': 8, 'distance_km': 5.1}, {'id': '3', 'name': 'Furever Friends', 'location': 'Karachi, Pakistan', 'phone_number': '021-9988776', 'website': 'furever.pk', 'pets_count': 20, 'distance_km': 1.8}, ], 'pets': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Bruno', 'age': 2, 'breed': 'Labrador', 'description': 'Friendly and energetic dog who loves outdoor walks.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '1', 'type': 'Dog'}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Mochi', 'age': 1, 'breed': 'Persian', 'description': 'Calm and affectionate indoor cat.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '2', 'type': 'Cat'}, {'id': '3', 'name': 'Rocky', 'age': 4, 'breed': 'German Shepherd', 'description': 'Loyal and intelligent, great with families.', 'available': False, 'shelter_id': '1', 'type': 'Dog'}, {'id': '4', 'name': 'Luna', 'age': 3, 'breed': 'Siamese', 'description': 'Playful and vocal cat who loves attention.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '3', 'type': 'Cat'}, {'id': '5', 'name': 'Max', 'age': 1, 'breed': 'Beagle', 'description': 'Curious and cheerful puppy full of energy.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '3', 'type': 'Dog'}, {'id': '6', 'name': 'Whiskers', 'age': 5, 'breed': 'Maine Coon', 'description': 'Gentle giant who enjoys quiet evenings.', 'available': True, 'shelter_id': '2', 'type': 'Cat'}, ], 'adoptions': [ {'id': 'APP001', 'shelter_id': '1', 'pet_id': '1', 'pet_name': 'Bruno', 'applicant_name': 'Zara Ahmed', 'applicant_email': 'zara@email.com', 'status': 'Pending', 'created_at': '2026-04-01'}, {'id': 'APP002', 'shelter_id': '2', 'pet_id': '2', 'pet_name': 'Mochi', 'applicant_name': 'Bilal Khan', 'applicant_email': 'bilal@email.com', 'status': 'Approved', 'created_at': '2026-04-03'}, {'id': 'APP003', 'shelter_id': '3', 'pet_id': '4', 'pet_name': 'Luna', 'applicant_name': 'Fatima Malik', 'applicant_email': 'fatima@email.com', 'status': 'Rejected', 'created_at': '2026-04-05'}, ] } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): featured = db['shelters'][:3] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'shelters': featured} ) @app.get('/shelters', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def shelters(request: Request, max_distance: str = ''): results = db['shelters'] if max_distance: results = [s for s in results if s['distance_km'] <= float(max_distance)] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='shelters.html', context={'shelters': results, 'sel_distance': max_distance} ) @app.get('/adopt-pets', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def adopt_pets(request: Request, breed: str = '', age: str = '', pet_type: str = ''): results = db['pets'] if breed: results = [p for p in results if breed.lower() in p['breed'].lower()] if age: results = [p for p in results if str(p['age']) == age] if pet_type: results = [p for p in results if p['type'] == pet_type] breeds = sorted(set(p['breed'] for p in db['pets'])) ages = sorted(set(str(p['age']) for p in db['pets'])) types = sorted(set(p['type'] for p in db['pets'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='adopt_pets.html', context={'pets': results, 'breeds': breeds, 'ages': ages, 'types': types, 'sel_breed': breed, 'sel_age': age, 'sel_type': pet_type} ) @app.post('/api/adoptions') async def apply_adoption( pet_id: str = Form(...), shelter_id: str = Form(...), applicant_name: str = Form(...), applicant_email: str = Form(...) ): pet = next((p for p in db['pets'] if p['id'] == pet_id), {}) db['adoptions'].append({ 'id': 'APP' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:4].upper(), 'shelter_id': shelter_id, 'pet_id': pet_id, 'pet_name': pet.get('name', ''), 'applicant_name': applicant_name, 'applicant_email': applicant_email, 'status': 'Pending', 'created_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }) return RedirectResponse(url='/admin-panel', status_code=303) @app.get('/admin-panel', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def admin_panel(request: Request): enriched = [] for a in db['adoptions']: shelter = next((s for s in db['shelters'] if s['id'] == a['shelter_id']), {}) enriched.append({**a, 'shelter_name': shelter.get('name', '—')}) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='admin_panel.html', context={'applications': enriched, 'pets': db['pets'], 'shelters': db['shelters']} ) @app.post('/admin-panel/update-status') async def update_status(application_id: str = Form(...), status: str = Form(...)): for a in db['adoptions']: if a['id'] == application_id: a['status'] = status return RedirectResponse(url='/admin-panel', status_code=303) @app.get('/api/shelters') async def api_shelters(): return {'shelters': db['shelters']} @app.get('/api/pets') async def api_pets(): return {'pets': db['pets']} @app.get('/api/admin/applications') async def api_applications(): return {'applications': db['adoptions']} @app.patch('/api/admin/applications/{app_id}') async def api_update_status(app_id: str, data: dict): for a in db['adoptions']: if a['id'] == app_id: a['status'] = data.get('status', a['status']) return {'status': 'updated'} @app.put('/api/admin/shelters') async def api_update_shelter(data: dict): return {'status': 'shelter updated'} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " PawsHome | Pet Adoption Platform

{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'users': [ {'id': '1', 'username': 'ali_hassan', 'email': 'ali@email.com', 'password_hash': 'hashed'}, {'id': '2', 'username': 'sara_k', 'email': 'sara@email.com', 'password_hash': 'hashed'}, {'id': '3', 'username': 'bilal99', 'email': 'bilal@email.com', 'password_hash': 'hashed'}, ], 'categories': [ {'id': '1', 'category_name': 'Mathematics'}, {'id': '2', 'category_name': 'Science'}, {'id': '3', 'category_name': 'History'}, {'id': '4', 'category_name': 'Computer Science'}, {'id': '5', 'category_name': 'General Knowledge'}, ], 'questions': [ {'id': '1', 'category_id': '4', 'question': 'What does CPU stand for?', 'options': ['Central Processing Unit', 'Computer Power Unit', 'Central Power Usage', 'Core Processing Utility'], 'answer': 0}, {'id': '2', 'category_id': '4', 'question': 'Which language is used for web styling?', 'options': ['Python', 'CSS', 'Java', 'C++'], 'answer': 1}, {'id': '3', 'category_id': '1', 'question': 'What is 12 x 12?', 'options': ['124', '144', '132', '148'], 'answer': 1}, {'id': '4', 'category_id': '2', 'question': 'What planet is closest to the Sun?', 'options': ['Earth', 'Mars', 'Mercury', 'Venus'], 'answer': 2}, ], 'quizzes': [ {'id': 'QZ001', 'user_id': '1', 'category_id': '4', 'category_name': 'Computer Science', 'score': 80, 'total': 2, 'correct': 2, 'completed_at': '2026-04-05'}, {'id': 'QZ002', 'user_id': '2', 'category_id': '1', 'category_name': 'Mathematics', 'score': 100, 'total': 1, 'correct': 1, 'completed_at': '2026-04-06'}, {'id': 'QZ003', 'user_id': '3', 'category_id': '2', 'category_name': 'Science', 'score': 50, 'total': 2, 'correct': 1, 'completed_at': '2026-04-07'}, ], 'session': {'logged_in': False, 'user': None} } @app.get('/login', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def login_page(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='login.html', context={'error': None} ) @app.post('/login') async def login(username: str = Form(...), password: str = Form(...)): user = next((u for u in db['users'] if u['username'] == username), None) if user: db['session'] = {'logged_in': True, 'user': user} return RedirectResponse(url='/categories', status_code=303) return RedirectResponse(url='/login?error=1', status_code=303) @app.get('/categories', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def categories(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='categories.html', context={'categories': db['categories']} ) @app.get('/quizzes', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def quizzes(request: Request, category_id: str = ''): questions = db['questions'] if category_id: questions = [q for q in questions if q['category_id'] == category_id] cat = next((c for c in db['categories'] if c['id'] == category_id), None) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='quizzes.html', context={'questions': questions, 'category': cat, 'category_id': category_id, 'categories': db['categories']} ) @app.post('/api/quizzes/submit') async def submit_quiz(request: Request, category_id: str = Form(...)): form = await request.form() questions = [q for q in db['questions'] if q['category_id'] == category_id] correct = 0 for q in questions: ans = form.get(f'answer_{q["id"]}') if ans is not None and int(ans) == q['answer']: correct += 1 total = len(questions) score = int((correct / total) * 100) if total else 0 cat = next((c for c in db['categories'] if c['id'] == category_id), {}) user = db['session'].get('user') or db['users'][0] db['quizzes'].append({ 'id': 'QZ' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:4].upper(), 'user_id': user['id'], 'category_id': category_id, 'category_name': cat.get('category_name', ''), 'score': score, 'total': total, 'correct': correct, 'completed_at': '2026-04-12' }) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='result.html', context={'score': score, 'correct': correct, 'total': total, 'category': cat} ) @app.get('/scores', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def scores(request: Request): enriched = [] for q in db['quizzes']: user = next((u for u in db['users'] if u['id'] == q['user_id']), {}) enriched.append({**q, 'username': user.get('username', '—')}) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='scores.html', context={'scores': enriched} ) @app.get('/leaderboards', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def leaderboards(request: Request): user_scores = {} for q in db['quizzes']: uid = q['user_id'] if uid not in user_scores: user = next((u for u in db['users'] if u['id'] == uid), {}) user_scores[uid] = {'username': user.get('username', '—'), 'total_score': 0, 'quizzes': 0} user_scores[uid]['total_score'] += q['score'] user_scores[uid]['quizzes'] += 1 leaderboard = sorted(user_scores.values(), key=lambda x: x['total_score'], reverse=True) for i, entry in enumerate(leaderboard): entry['rank'] = i + 1 return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='leaderboards.html', context={'leaderboard': leaderboard} ) @app.post('/api/login') async def api_login(data: dict): return {'status': 'authenticated', 'token': 'mock-jwt-token'} @app.get('/api/categories') async def api_categories(): return {'categories': db['categories']} @app.post('/api/questions') async def api_create_question(data: dict): return {'status': 'created'} @app.post('/api/quizzes') async def api_start_quiz(data: dict): return {'status': 'started', 'quiz_id': 'QZ' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:5]} @app.get('/api/scores') async def api_scores(): return {'scores': db['quizzes']} @app.get('/api/leaderboards') async def api_leaderboards(): return {'leaderboard': db['quizzes']} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " QuizMaster | Quiz Application
QuizMaster
Categories Quizzes Scores Leaderboard
Sign In
{% block content %}{% endblock %}
© 2026 QuizMaster. Learn, Compete, and Grow.
"}, {"path": "templates/login.html", "content": "{% extends 'base.html' %} {% block content %}

{"files": [{"path": "requirements.txt", "content": "fastapi uvicorn jinja2 python-multipart"}, {"path": "main.py", "content": "from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, Form from fastapi.templating import Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'recipes': [ {'id': '1', 'title': 'Chicken Biryani', 'author': 'Fatima K.', 'category': 'Main Course', 'ingredients': 'Chicken, Basmati Rice, Yogurt, Spices, Onion, Tomatoes', 'instructions': '1. Marinate chicken. 2. Fry onions. 3. Layer rice and chicken. 4. Cook on dum for 30 mins.', 'created_at': '2026-03-10', 'avg_rating': 4.8, 'ratings_count': 24}, {'id': '2', 'title': 'Chocolate Lava Cake', 'author': 'Sara N.', 'category': 'Dessert', 'ingredients': 'Dark Chocolate, Butter, Eggs, Sugar, Flour', 'instructions': '1. Melt chocolate and butter. 2. Mix eggs and sugar. 3. Fold in flour. 4. Bake 12 mins at 200C.', 'created_at': '2026-03-15', 'avg_rating': 4.9, 'ratings_count': 31}, {'id': '3', 'title': 'Caesar Salad', 'author': 'Ali H.', 'category': 'Salad', 'ingredients': 'Romaine Lettuce, Croutons, Parmesan, Caesar Dressing, Lemon', 'instructions': '1. Wash lettuce. 2. Toss with dressing. 3. Add croutons and cheese.', 'created_at': '2026-04-01', 'avg_rating': 4.2, 'ratings_count': 12}, {'id': '4', 'title': 'Mango Smoothie', 'author': 'Zara M.', 'category': 'Drinks', 'ingredients': 'Mango, Milk, Sugar, Ice Cream', 'instructions': '1. Blend all ingredients. 2. Serve chilled.', 'created_at': '2026-04-05', 'avg_rating': 4.6, 'ratings_count': 18}, ], 'comments': [ {'id': '1', 'recipe_id': '1', 'comment_text': 'Absolutely delicious! Made it for Eid.', 'user_name': 'Bilal A.', 'created_at': '2026-03-12'}, {'id': '2', 'recipe_id': '1', 'comment_text': 'Perfect recipe, exactly like restaurant biryani.', 'user_name': 'Hina K.', 'created_at': '2026-03-14'}, {'id': '3', 'recipe_id': '2', 'comment_text': 'The lava was perfect, super gooey!', 'user_name': 'Omar T.', 'created_at': '2026-03-18'}, ], 'favorites': [] } @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): featured = sorted(db['recipes'], key=lambda x: x['avg_rating'], reverse=True)[:3] categories = sorted(set(r['category'] for r in db['recipes'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'featured': featured, 'categories': categories} ) @app.get('/recipes', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def recipes(request: Request, q: str = '', category: str = ''): results = db['recipes'] if q: results = [r for r in results if q.lower() in r['title'].lower() or q.lower() in r['ingredients'].lower()] if category: results = [r for r in results if r['category'] == category] categories = sorted(set(r['category'] for r in db['recipes'])) fav_ids = {f['recipe_id'] for f in db['favorites']} return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='recipes.html', context={'recipes': results, 'categories': categories, 'q': q, 'sel_category': category, 'fav_ids': fav_ids} ) @app.get('/recipes/{recipe_id}', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def recipe_detail(request: Request, recipe_id: str): recipe = next((r for r in db['recipes'] if r['id'] == recipe_id), None) if not recipe: return RedirectResponse(url='/recipes', status_code=303) comments = [c for c in db['comments'] if c['recipe_id'] == recipe_id] stars = range(1, 6) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='recipe_detail.html', context={'recipe': recipe, 'comments': comments, 'stars': stars} ) @app.post('/recipes/{recipe_id}/comment') async def add_comment(recipe_id: str, user_name: str = Form(...), comment_text: str = Form(...)): db['comments'].append({ 'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'recipe_id': recipe_id, 'comment_text': comment_text, 'user_name': user_name, 'created_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }) return RedirectResponse(url=f'/recipes/{recipe_id}', status_code=303) @app.post('/recipes/{recipe_id}/rate') async def rate_recipe(recipe_id: str, rating: int = Form(...)): recipe = next((r for r in db['recipes'] if r['id'] == recipe_id), None) if recipe: total = recipe['avg_rating'] * recipe['ratings_count'] + rating recipe['ratings_count'] += 1 recipe['avg_rating'] = round(total / recipe['ratings_count'], 1) return RedirectResponse(url=f'/recipes/{recipe_id}', status_code=303) @app.post('/api/favorites') async def toggle_favorite(recipe_id: str = Form(...), user_name: str = Form(...)): existing = next((f for f in db['favorites'] if f['recipe_id'] == recipe_id and f['user_name'] == user_name), None) if existing: db['favorites'].remove(existing) else: db['favorites'].append({'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'recipe_id': recipe_id, 'user_name': user_name, 'created_at': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')}) return RedirectResponse(url='/recipes', status_code=303) @app.get('/favorites', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def favorites(request: Request): fav_ids = {f['recipe_id'] for f in db['favorites']} fav_recipes = [r for r in db['recipes'] if r['id'] in fav_ids] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='favorites.html', context={'recipes': fav_recipes} ) @app.post('/api/recipes') async def api_upload_recipe(data: dict): return {'status': 'uploaded'} @app.get('/api/recipes') async def api_recipes(): return {'recipes': db['recipes']} @app.get('/api/search') async def api_search(q: str = ''): results = [r for r in db['recipes'] if q.lower() in r['title'].lower() or q.lower() in r['ingredients'].lower()] return {'results': results} "}, {"path": Jinja2Templates from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse, RedirectResponse import uuid from datetime import datetime app = FastAPI() templates = Jinja2Templates(directory='templates') db = { 'users': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Ali Hassan', 'email': 'ali@email.com', 'password': 'pass123', 'role': 'customer'}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Admin User', 'email': 'admin@boxco.com', 'password': 'admin123', 'role': 'admin'}, ], 'products': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Artisan Coffee Set', 'category': 'Food', 'price': 29.99, 'description': 'Premium single-origin coffee beans from 3 different regions.', 'image_url': ''}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Skincare Starter Kit', 'category': 'Beauty', 'price': 45.00, 'description': 'Curated moisturizers, serums, and cleansers for glowing skin.', 'image_url': ''}, {'id': '3', 'name': 'Yoga Essentials Box', 'category': 'Fitness', 'price': 55.00, 'description': 'Resistance bands, foam roller, and guided workout cards.', 'image_url': ''}, {'id': '4', 'name': 'Snack Attack Bundle', 'category': 'Food', 'price': 22.99, 'description': 'Healthy and indulgent snacks from local artisan producers.', 'image_url': ''}, {'id': '5', 'name': 'Tech Gadget Box', 'category': 'Tech', 'price': 79.99, 'description': 'Compact accessories and tools for everyday productivity.', 'image_url': ''}, {'id': '6', 'name': 'Book Lovers Crate', 'category': 'Books', 'price': 39.99, 'description': 'Two curated books plus themed literary accessories.', 'image_url': ''}, ], 'carts': [], 'orders': [ {'id': 'ORD001', 'user_id': '1', 'status': 'Delivered', 'delivery_date': '2026-03-20', 'total_amount': 84.99, 'items': ['Artisan Coffee Set', 'Snack Attack Bundle']}, {'id': 'ORD002', 'user_id': '1', 'status': 'Shipped', 'delivery_date': '2026-04-15', 'total_amount': 45.00, 'items': ['Skincare Starter Kit']}, ], 'inventory': [ {'id': '1', 'product_id': '1', 'stock_quantity': 100, 'available_date': '2026-04-01'}, {'id': '2', 'product_id': '2', 'stock_quantity': 75, 'available_date': '2026-04-01'}, {'id': '3', 'product_id': '3', 'stock_quantity': 50, 'available_date': '2026-04-15'}, ], 'plans': [ {'id': '1', 'name': 'Starter', 'price': 19.99, 'duration': 'Monthly', 'description': '1 curated box per month. Perfect for trying out.'}, {'id': '2', 'name': 'Pro', 'price': 49.99, 'duration': 'Monthly', 'description': '3 boxes per month with exclusive member discounts.'}, {'id': '3', 'name': 'Annual', 'price': 199.99, 'duration': 'Yearly', 'description': 'Best value. 12 boxes + free shipping on all orders.'}, ], 'session': {'logged_in': False, 'user': None} } def get_cart_total(): total = 0 for item in db['carts']: prod = next((p for p in db['products'] if p['id'] == item['product_id']), {}) total += prod.get('price', 0) * item.get('quantity', 1) return total @app.get('/', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def home(request: Request): featured = db['products'][:4] return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='home.html', context={'featured': featured, 'plans': db['plans']} ) @app.get('/login', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def login_page(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='login.html', context={'error': False} ) @app.post('/login') async def login(email: str = Form(...), password: str = Form(...)): user = next((u for u in db['users'] if u['email'] == email and u['password'] == password), None) if user: db['session'] = {'logged_in': True, 'user': user} if user['role'] == 'admin': return RedirectResponse(url='/admin-dashboard', status_code=303) return RedirectResponse(url='/products', status_code=303) return RedirectResponse(url='/login?error=1', status_code=303) @app.get('/products', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def products(request: Request, category: str = '', max_price: str = ''): results = db['products'] if category: results = [p for p in results if p['category'] == category] if max_price: results = [p for p in results if p['price'] <= float(max_price)] categories = sorted(set(p['category'] for p in db['products'])) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='products.html', context={'products': results, 'categories': categories, 'sel_category': category, 'sel_max_price': max_price} ) @app.post('/api/cart') async def add_to_cart(product_id: str = Form(...), quantity: int = Form(default=1)): existing = next((c for c in db['carts'] if c['product_id'] == product_id), None) if existing: existing['quantity'] += quantity else: db['carts'].append({'id': str(uuid.uuid4())[:5], 'user_id': '1', 'product_id': product_id, 'quantity': quantity}) return RedirectResponse(url='/cart', status_code=303) @app.get('/cart', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def cart(request: Request): enriched = [] for item in db['carts']: prod = next((p for p in db['products'] if p['id'] == item['product_id']), {}) enriched.append({**item, 'name': prod.get('name', ''), 'price': prod.get('price', 0), 'category': prod.get('category', ''), 'subtotal': prod.get('price', 0) * item['quantity']}) total = sum(i['subtotal'] for i in enriched) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='cart.html', context={'cart': enriched, 'total': total} ) @app.post('/checkout') async def checkout(): total = get_cart_total() if db['carts']: items = [] for item in db['carts']: prod = next((p for p in db['products'] if p['id'] == item['product_id']), {}) items.append(prod.get('name', '')) db['orders'].append({ 'id': 'ORD' + str(uuid.uuid4())[:4].upper(), 'user_id': '1', 'status': 'Processing', 'delivery_date': '2026-05-01', 'total_amount': total, 'items': items }) db['carts'].clear() return RedirectResponse(url='/orders', status_code=303) @app.get('/orders', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def orders(request: Request): return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='orders.html', context={'orders': db['orders']} ) @app.get('/admin-dashboard', response_class=HTMLResponse) async def admin_dashboard(request: Request): total_revenue = sum(o['total_amount'] for o in db['orders']) inv_enriched = [] for inv in db['inventory']: prod = next((p for p in db['products'] if p['id'] == inv['product_id']), {}) inv_enriched.append({**inv, 'product_name': prod.get('name', '—'), 'category': prod.get('category', '—')}) return templates.TemplateResponse( request=request, name='admin_dashboard.html', context={'products': db['products'], 'orders': db['orders'], 'inventory': inv_enriched, 'plans': db['plans'], 'total_revenue': total_revenue} ) @app.post('/api/login') async def api_login(data: dict): return {'status': 'authenticated', 'token': 'mock-token'} @app.get('/api/products') async def api_products(): return {'products': db['products']} @app.get('/api/orders') async def api_orders(): return {'orders': db['orders']} @app.post('/api/admin/inventory') async def api_manage_inventory(data: dict): return {'status': 'inventory updated'} @app.post('/api/admin/plans') async def api_manage_plans(data: dict): return {'status': 'plan updated'} "}, {"path": "templates/base.html", "content": " BoxCo | Subscription Box Platform
